rationale: Severe mismatch on every axis: a high-intensity Dragon Ball Z anime brawl hook (saturated gold/navy/orange, shouting VO, "challenge" pitch) is the opposite of Marble Sort's calm pastel-lavender, character-free, satisfying-sort vibe targeted at 25-55 women. The mechanic doesn't translate either — there's no combat, hero, or power-up moment to anchor a "Dragon Fist" payoff to color sorting, and using licensed Goku IP is a legal non-starter. Skip this archetype; if the team wants a "challenge" angle, recreate it as a "can you sort it before time runs out?" fail-state hook instead.
